description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Push that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should also be triggerable manually. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, installs various Arduino libraries (TFT_eSPI, LinkedList, lv_arduino, JPEGDecoder, NimBLE-Arduino, Adafruit_NeoPixel, ArduinoJson, SwitchLib) from their respective repositories, and then compiles an Arduino sketch (esp32_marauder.ino) for an ESP32 board using the arduino-test-compile action.
